collections.title: Spring 2026 Collection
collections.description: Soft colors, playful details, and handcrafted salon-quality finish.

products.title: Dual Dots
products.description:
INCLUDED
- 1 NAIL GLUE
- 1 SHEET STICKY TABS
- 1 NAIL FILE
- 1 ALCOHOL WIPE
- 1 CUTICLE TOOL

SIZING
Style runs true to size.

MEASURMENT METHOD

APPLICATION
-STEP 1: Wash hands and dry completely. Buff your natural nails using the finer side of the nail file (included).

-STEP 2: Push back cuticles, then select the best fitting nail for each finger and set aside in order.

-STEP 3: Apply glue/sticky tabs (included) to the back of your Runzie Nail.

-STEP 4: Place your Runzie Nail slightly under your cuticle for a seamless, natural look. Press down firmly for 30+ seconds using your thumb. Ensure the entire nail is covered and receiving pressure.

-STEP 5: If needed, use more glue and pressure to avoid air pockets.

HOW TO REMOVE & REAPPLY
-STEP 1: Never force or pull off.

-STEP 2: Soak your hands in hot water mixed with soap and a little bit of cooking oil for 10-20 minutes.

-STEP 3: Use your cuticle stick (included) to gently lift off your Runzie Nail from the base of your nails.

-STEP 4: Remove the remaining adhesive from your Runzie Nail and store them back to the acrylic case. 

To reapply, simply follow the steps above and done!

MEASURMENT METHOD

APPLICATION
-STEP 1: Wash hands and dry completely. Buff your natural nails using the finer side of the nail file (included).

-STEP 2: Push back cuticles, then select the best fitting nail for each finger and set aside in order.

-STEP 3: Apply glue/sticky tabs (included) to the back of your Runzie Nail.

-STEP 4: Place your Runzie Nail slightly under your cuticle for a seamless, natural look. Press down firmly for 30+ seconds using your thumb. Ensure the entire nail is covered and receiving pressure.

-STEP 5: If needed, use more glue and pressure to avoid air pockets.

HOW TO REMOVE & REAPPLY
-STEP 1: Never force or pull off.

-STEP 2: Soak your hands in hot water mixed with soap and a little bit of cooking oil for 10-20 minutes.

-STEP 3: Use your cuticle stick (included) to gently lift off your Runzie Nail from the base of your nails.

-STEP 4: Remove the remaining adhesive from your Runzie Nail and store them back to the acrylic case. 

To reapply, simply follow the steps above and done!

-STEP 5: If needed, use more glue and pressure to avoid air pockets.

HOW TO REMOVE & REAPPLY
-STEP 1: Never force or pull off.

-STEP 2: Soak your hands in hot water mixed with soap and a little bit of cooking oil for 10-20 minutes.

-STEP 3: Use your cuticle stick (included) to gently lift off your Runzie Nail from the base of your nails.

-STEP 4: Remove the remaining adhesive from your Runzie Nail and store them back to the acrylic case. 

To reapply, simply follow the steps above and done!
